(f5 BETWEEN TRUE AND 1) OR (f6 >= 'O''Reilly')
f3 != 'test'
f5 >= 3.14
f1 = NULL
f4 != "\t"

f6 = 6.02e23

AND f6 = f4
((f4 BETWEEN 0 AND f1) OR (f5 REGEXP 'O''Reilly')) OR (hasAny(f3, 3.14))
